draft:
Project management doesn't have to be complicated.

We talked to 200 project managers and found that the #1 frustration is tool overload — too many apps, too many notifications, too many places to check.

That's why we built Orbit with simplicity as a core principle. One tool. One source of truth. Zero chaos.

What's your biggest project management frustration? Drop it in the comments.
